channel.title: Contextual Mac Translator
channel.description: Auto-update feed for Contextual Mac Translator. Sparkle 2 + EdDSA signed.

item.title: v0.6.0
item.description:
OTA auto-updates with Sparkle 2

This is the first release with Sparkle integration. From now on, the app checks for updates automatically — no more manual DMG downloads.

  • Daily background check for new releases
  • "Check for Updates…" in the menu bar
  • EdDSA-signed update bundles (tamper-proof)
  • Apple-notarized DMG + update zip

See release notes on GitHub.
